original_file: Scams are smarter. So is Avast.
email_subject: Scams are smarter. So is Avast.
email_body:
Avast NEW: Stay ahead of mobile scams and deepfakes with Avast Premium Security https://click.emails.avast.com/?%3D%3D https://click.emails.avast.com/? View in browser Today’s scams target you Scams have changed. Avast protection has evolved. You’re already taking smart steps to secure your PC. Avast Free Antivirus guards against malware, phishing, and other attacks that target your computer. But today’s scams don’t start with malware, they start with pressure. - A call that sounds like your bank. - A delivery text that feels urgent. - AI-generated videos or voices that seem real. With new AI-powered scam detection, Avast Premium Security helps you spot suspicious calls, texts, and content1 earlier, before you’re pushed to react on your phone and PC.
